\u0026amp; manga platform built for fans who want a seamless, ad-free experience. It hooks into AniList and MyAnimeList and utilizes the Miruro API to provide a comprehensive anime library — along with a fully integrated manga reader — all wrapped in a gorgeous Glassmorphism user interface.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003eOur focus is entirely on usability, speed, and cross-platform consistency.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e✨ Key Features\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content--key-features\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: ✨ Key Features\" href=\"#-key-features\"\u003e\u003csvg data-component=\"Octicon\" class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e🚫 Ad-Free Streaming \u0026amp; Reading\u003c/strong\u003e: Pure entertainment without popups, redirects, or visual clutter.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e📺 High-Quality Playback\u003c/strong\u003e: Fast streaming with multiple server options, subtitle/audio toggles, and quality selectors natively baked into the player.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e⏭️ Intro \u0026amp; Outro Skip\u003c/strong\u003e: Smart episode intro and outro detection on the anime info page — skip straight to the action or the next episode with a single click.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e📚 Manga Reader\u003c/strong\u003e: Browse, search, and read manga directly on YumeZone with a clean, distraction-free chapter reader.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e🔄 Two-Way Tracker Sync\u003c/strong\u003e: Link \u003cstrong\u003eAniList\u003c/strong\u003e and \u003cstrong\u003eMyAnimeList\u003c/strong\u003e accounts! The player will automatically update your viewing progress seamlessly in the background as you watch.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e💬 Live Comments \u0026amp; Reactions\u003c/strong\u003e: Express yourself on episodes using the custom-built nested comment system with integrated GIF support. Drop quick \"likes\" or \"dislikes\" on comments and specific episodes.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e⏯️ Smart Resume\u003c/strong\u003e: Intelligent tracking remembers exactly what episode you were on. \"Watch Now\" will instantly drop you back into the action.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e🎨 Modern UI/UX\u003c/strong\u003e:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eGlassmorphism Design\u003c/strong\u003e: Sleek, immersive dark-themed presentation.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eSpotlight Carousel\u003c/strong\u003e: Discover tracking information, genres, ratings, and studios right from the top page.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eCinema Mode\u003c/strong\u003e: Distraction-free, immersive video player layout.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eFully Responsive\u003c/strong\u003e: A premium and consistent experience whether you are on Desktop, Tablet, or Mobile.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e🔐 Secure Authentication\u003c/strong\u003e: Includes full user accounts, password recovery flow via email, Turnstile bot protection, and more.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e🔎 Advanced Discoverability\u003c/strong\u003e: Deep search, category filtering, schedule countdowns, and genre exploration — for both anime and manga.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" ==============================================================================\n# Security \u0026amp; App Config\n# ==============================================================================\n# FLASK_KEY\nAPI_KEY=\u0026quot;YOUR_GENERATED_API_KEY\u0026quot;\n# Comma-separated allowed origins for CORS\nALLOWED_ORIGINS=\u0026quot;https://your-app.app,http://localhost:5000\u0026quot;\n\n# ==============================================================================\n# Database Configuration (MongoDB)\n# ==============================================================================\nMONGODB_URI=\u0026quot;mongodb+srv://\u0026lt;username\u0026gt;:\u0026lt;password\u0026gt;@\u0026lt;cluster\u0026gt;.mongodb.net/?retryWrites=true\u0026amp;w=majority\u0026amp;appName=YourApp\u0026quot;\ndb=\u0026quot;name_of_your_database\u0026quot;\nusers_collection=\u0026quot;name_of_your_users_collection\u0026quot;\nwatchlist_collection=\u0026quot;name_of_your_watchlist_collection\u0026quot;\ncomments_collection=\u0026quot;comments\u0026quot;\nepisode_reactions_collection=\u0026quot;episode_reactions\u0026quot;\n\n# ==============================================================================\n# Streaming \u0026amp; Scraping Services\n# ==============================================================================\nAPI_URL=\u0026quot;https://api.your-domain.com/\u0026quot;\nPROXY_URL=\u0026quot;https://proxy.your-domain.com/proxy/\u0026quot;\n\n# ==============================================================================\n# Captcha / Bot Protection (Cloudflare Turnstile)\n# ==============================================================================\n# Get from: Cloudflare Dashboard → Turnstile → Add Site\nCLOUDFLARE_SECRET=\u0026quot;YOUR_CLOUDFLARE_SECRET\u0026quot;\nCF_SITE_KEY=\u0026quot;YOUR_CF_SITE_KEY\u0026quot;\n\n# ==============================================================================\n# Email Configuration (SMTP) — For Password Resets\n# ==============================================================================\n# Google Account → Security → 2-Step Verification → App passwords\nGMAIL_USER=\u0026quot;your-email@gmail.com\u0026quot;\nGMAIL_APP_PASSWORD=\u0026quot;your-16-char-app-password\u0026quot;\n\n# ==============================================================================\n# OAuth Integrations: AniList\n# ==============================================================================\n# Create an API client at: https://anilist.co/settings/developer\nANILIST_CLIENT_ID=\u0026quot;YOUR_ANILIST_CLIENT_ID\u0026quot;\nANILIST_CLIENT_SECRET=\u0026quot;YOUR_ANILIST_CLIENT_SECRET\u0026quot;\nANILIST_REDIRECT_URI=\u0026quot;https://your-domain.com/auth/anilist/callback\u0026quot;\n\n# ==============================================================================\n# OAuth Integrations: MyAnimeList\n# ==============================================================================\n# Create an API client at: https://myanimelist.net/apiconfig (select \u0026quot;Web\u0026quot; App   <div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h1 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">YumeZone</h1><a id="user-content-yumezone" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: YumeZone" href="#yumezone"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
  <p dir="auto"><strong>Your Ultimate Ad-Free Anime & Manga Streaming Experience</strong></p>
  <p dir="auto">
    <a href="https://yumezone.vercel.app/home" rel="nofollow"><strong>⛩️ YumeZone</strong></a>
  </p>

<hr>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">📖 Introduction</h2><a id="user-content--introduction" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 📖 Introduction" href="#-introduction"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto"><strong>YumeZone</strong> is a highly polished, feature-rich anime & manga platform built for fans who want a seamless, ad-free experience. It hooks into AniList and MyAnimeList and utilizes the Miruro API to provide a comprehensive anime library — along with a fully integrated manga reader — all wrapped in a gorgeous Glassmorphism user interface.</p>
<p dir="auto">Our focus is entirely on usability, speed, and cross-platform consistency.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">✨ Key Features</h2><a id="user-content--key-features" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: ✨ Key Features" href="#-key-features"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>🚫 Ad-Free Streaming & Reading</strong>: Pure entertainment without popups, redirects, or visual clutter.</li>
<li><strong>📺 High-Quality Playback</strong>: Fast streaming with multiple server options, subtitle/audio toggles, and quality selectors natively baked into the player.</li>
<li><strong>⏭️ Intro & Outro Skip</strong>: Smart episode intro and outro detection on the anime info page — skip straight to the action or the next episode with a single click.</li>
<li><strong>📚 Manga Reader</strong>: Browse, search, and read manga directly on YumeZone with a clean, distraction-free chapter reader.</li>
<li><strong>🔄 Two-Way Tracker Sync</strong>: Link <strong>AniList</strong> and <strong>MyAnimeList</strong> accounts! The player will automatically update your viewing progress seamlessly in the background as you watch.</li>
<li><strong>💬 Live Comments & Reactions</strong>: Express yourself on episodes using the custom-built nested comment system with integrated GIF support. Drop quick "likes" or "dislikes" on comments and specific episodes.</li>
<li><strong>⏯️ Smart Resume</strong>: Intelligent tracking remembers exactly what episode you were on. "Watch Now" will instantly drop you back into the action.</li>
<li><strong>🎨 Modern UI/UX</strong>:
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Glassmorphism Design</strong>: Sleek, immersive dark-themed presentation.</li>
<li><strong>Spotlight Carousel</strong>: Discover tracking information, genres, ratings, and studios right from the top page.</li>
<li><strong>Cinema Mode</strong>: Distraction-free, immersive video player layout.</li>
<li><strong>Fully Responsive</strong>: A premium and consistent experience whether you are on Desktop, Tablet, or Mobile.</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li><strong>🔐 Secure Authentication</strong>: Includes full user accounts, password recovery flow via email, Turnstile bot protection, and more.</li>
<li><strong>🔎 Advanced Discoverability</strong>: Deep search, category filtering, schedule countdowns, and genre exploration — for both anime and manga.</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">🛠️ Tech Stack</h2><a id="user-content-️-tech-stack" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 🛠️ Tech Stack" href="#️-tech-stack"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Backend</strong>: Python (Flask, Async/Await)</li>
<li><strong>Frontend</strong>: HTML5, CSS3 (Vanilla / Custom Variables), JavaScript</li>
<li><strong>Video Player</strong>: Video.js with specialized integrations</li>
<li><strong>Database</strong>: MongoDB (User accounts, watch history, caching logic)</li>
<li><strong>Data & Streaming APIs</strong>: Miruro Native API, AniList GraphQL, MyAnimeList OAuth API</li>
<li><strong>Security</strong>: Cloudflare Turnstile, Bcrypt Password Hashing, Session Versioning</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">🚀 Installation & Local Development</h2><a id="user-content--installation--local-development" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 🚀 Installation & Local Development" href="#-installation--local-development"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Ready to run YumeZone locally? Follow these steps:</p>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Clone the Repository</strong></p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="git clone https://github.com/OTAKUWeBer/YumeZone
cd YumeZone"><pre>git clone https://github.com/OTAKUWeBer/YumeZone
<span class="pl-c1">cd</span> YumeZone</pre></div>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Create a Virtual Environment</strong></p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="python -m venv venv
# Windows
venv\Scripts\activate
# macOS/Linux
source venv/bin/activate"><pre>python -m venv venv
<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Windows</span>
venv<span class="pl-cce">\S</span>cripts<span class="pl-cce">\a</span>ctivate
<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> macOS/Linux</span>
<span class="pl-c1">source</span> venv/bin/activate</pre></div>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Install Dependencies</strong></p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="pip install -r requirements.txt"><pre>pip install -r requirements.txt</pre></div>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Set Up Environment Variables</strong>
Duplicate <code>.env.example</code> and rename it to <code>.env</code>. Fill in the required parameters:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-dotenv notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="# ==============================================================================
# Security & App Config
# ==============================================================================
# Generate with: python -c "import secrets; print(secrets.token_hex(32))"
FLASK_KEY="YOUR_RANDOM_FLASK_SECRET_KEY"
# Internal API key — generate the same way as FLASK_KEY
API_KEY="YOUR_GENERATED_API_KEY"
# Comma-separated allowed origins for CORS
ALLOWED_ORIGINS="https://your-app.app,http://localhost:5000"

# ==============================================================================
# Database Configuration (MongoDB)
# ==============================================================================
MONGODB_URI="mongodb+srv://<username>:<password>@<cluster>.mongodb.net/?retryWrites=true&w=majority&appName=YourApp"
db="name_of_your_database"
users_collection="name_of_your_users_collection"
watchlist_collection="name_of_your_watchlist_collection"
comments_collection="comments"
episode_reactions_collection="episode_reactions"

# ==============================================================================
# Streaming & Scraping Services
# ==============================================================================
API_URL="https://api.your-domain.com/"
PROXY_URL="https://proxy.your-domain.com/proxy/"

# ==============================================================================
# Captcha / Bot Protection (Cloudflare Turnstile)
# ==============================================================================
# Get from: Cloudflare Dashboard → Turnstile → Add Site
CLOUDFLARE_SECRET="YOUR_CLOUDFLARE_SECRET"
CF_SITE_KEY="YOUR_CF_SITE_KEY"

# ==============================================================================
# Email Configuration (SMTP) — For Password Resets
# ==============================================================================
# Google Account → Security → 2-Step Verification → App passwords
GMAIL_USER="your-email@gmail.com"
GMAIL_APP_PASSWORD="your-16-char-app-password"

# ==============================================================================
# OAuth Integrations: AniList
# ==============================================================================
# Create an API client at: https://anilist.co/settings/developer
ANILIST_CLIENT_ID="YOUR_ANILIST_CLIENT_ID"
ANILIST_CLIENT_SECRET="YOUR_ANILIST_CLIENT_SECRET"
ANILIST_REDIRECT_URI="https://your-domain.com/auth/anilist/callback"

# ==============================================================================
# OAuth Integrations: MyAnimeList
# ==============================================================================
# Create an API client at: https://myanimelist.net/apiconfig (select "Web" App Type)
MAL_CLIENT_ID="YOUR_MAL_CLIENT_ID"
MAL_CLIENT_SECRET="YOUR_MAL_CLIENT_SECRET"
MAL_REDIRECT_URI="https://your-domain.com/auth/mal/callback""><pre><span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> ==============================================================================</span>

</li>
</ol>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">⚙️ Integrations Setup Notes</h2><a id="user-content-️-integrations-setup-notes" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: ⚙️ Integrations Setup Notes" href="#️-integrations-setup-notes"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Miruro API</strong>: You'll need access to a Miruro-compatible data API instance for anime indexing and m3u8 stream resolution.</li>
<li><strong>AniList & MyAnimeList</strong>: Go to their respective Developer Portals, create a new application, and match the OAuth Redirect URIs to your <code>.env</code> values.</li>
<li><strong>Cloudflare Turnstile</strong>: Log into the <a href="https://dash.cloudflare.com/" rel="nofollow">Cloudflare Dashboard</a> → <strong>Turnstile</strong> → <strong>Add Site</strong>. Copy the <strong>Site Key</strong> into <code>CF_SITE_KEY</code> and the <strong>Secret Key</strong> into <code>CLOUDFLARE_SECRET</code>. Make sure your production domain is listed as an allowed hostname in the Turnstile widget settings.</li>
<li><strong>API Key</strong>: <code>API_KEY</code> is used for internal service-to-service security. Generate a strong random string the same way as <code>FLASK_KEY</code> — keep it secret and never commit it to version control.</li>
<li><strong>Passwords via Gmail</strong>: You'll need to generate a Google App Password for the application to dispatch secure password reset tokens. Go to <strong>Google Account → Security → 2-Step Verification → App passwords</strong>.</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">🤝 Contributing</h2><a id="user-content--contributing" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 🤝 Contributing" href="#-contributing"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">We welcome community contributions! Found a bug, or have a UI polish idea? Read our setup to dive in:</p>
<ol dir="auto">
<li><strong>Fork the Project</strong></li>
<li>Create your Feature Branch (<code>git checkout -b feature/CoolNewAddition</code>)</li>
<li>Commit your Changes (<code>git commit -m 'feat: Add a new custom player skin'</code>)</li>
<li>Push to the Branch (<code>git push origin feature/CoolNewAddition</code>)</li>
<li>Open a <strong>Pull Request</strong></li>
</ol>
